query: SELECT id, clientId, title, filename, driveFileId, s3Key, mimeType FROM partnerDocuments WHERE title LIKE '%RRAL%' OR filename LIKE '%RRAL%' OR mimeType LIKE '%spreadsheet%' OR mimeType LIKE '%excel%' OR filename LIKE '%.xlsx' OR filename LIKE '%.xls' OR filename LIKE '%.csv' LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27oV2HNhPbfG1Yy.f6bc15b848e8 --database hgGEXRHUCG7apwzJRKH7LF --execute SELECT id, clientId, title, filename, driveFileId, s3Key, mimeType FROM partnerDocuments WHERE title LIKE '%RRAL%' OR filename LIKE '%RRAL%' OR mimeType LIKE '%spreadsheet%' OR mimeType LIKE '%excel%' OR filename LIKE '%.xlsx' OR filename LIKE '%.xls' OR filename LIKE '%.csv' LIMIT 10;
